abort.single_instance_allowed: Only one Better Presence instance is allowed.

add_person.title: Add Person — Step 1: Name
add_person.description: The **Sensor entity ID** becomes the entity name (e.g. "thomas_bp2" creates sensor.better_presence_thomas_bp2). The **Display name** is shown in the UI and automations.

add_person_details.title: Add Person — Step 2: Device Trackers
add_person_details.description: Select one or more device trackers. Best choice: Mobile App tracker. Additionally recommended: ping or nmap tracker for more reliable home detection.

edit_person_details.title: Edit Person — {person_id}
edit_person_details.description: Select one or more device trackers. Best choice: Mobile App tracker. Additionally recommended: ping or nmap tracker for more reliable home detection.

error.person_id_exists: A person with this ID already exists.
error.no_devices_selected: Please select at least one device tracker.
